title: qualea ingens var. duckei
intro: Qualea ingens var. duckei is a plant species found in the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Vochysiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Qualea ingens var. duckei include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Qualea ingens var. duckei is traditionally prepared as a tea or infused in water to be consumed as a herbal remedy for various ailments.
